sections.paragraph: m., adj. verb, elect, chosen, ἐ̓κλεκτός: only in the phrase בְּחִיר יְהֹוָה chosen of God, 2Sa 21:6 of Moses, Psa 106:23 of the people of Israel, Isa 43:20 45:4 (parall. עֶבֶר יְהֹוָה); of the pious and prophets, Isa 42:1 (according to others, of the Messiah [this is of course the true application]); pl. of the pious, Isa 65:9, 15 Isa 65:15, 22 Isa 65:22 Psa 105:43.
